body: Please review docs/TRINITY_QUOTA_GUARD.md, trinity_bridge/quota_guard.py, trinity_bridge/quota_schema.py, tools/trinity_quota_guard.py, ai_chi/tests/test_trinity_quota_guard.py, _MODEL_TRINITY/bridge/agent-capabilities.json, and _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CODEX_TRINITY_QUOTA_GUARD_2026-06-14.md. Focus on authority boundary, metadata-read limits, false-positive quota evidence handling, downtime semantics, and foreground-only operation. Verification: 395 tests OK, verify_floor True, raw_secret_scan pass.
forbidden_actions: network listener or hidden service start
paid credit enablement or auto top-up
summary: Codex implemented stdlib local Trinity quota guard with config defaults, state computation, downtime logs, throttled metadata-only quota_poke packets, router decisions, docs, capability registry entry, and 395 green tests. No providers, secrets, app config, paid credits, network listeners, or hidden service.
